content.body: FYI, regarding [html#11933](https://github.com/whatwg/html/pull/11933) (importing text modules), I intend to ask for Stage 3 for the corresponding [TC39 proposal](https://github.com/tc39/proposal-import-text) at its upcoming meeting next week. I also hope that with its [PR #10](https://github.com/tc39/proposal-import-text/pull/10) we'll be able to resolve the remaining concerns about the handling of the import of non-text files as text. Merging that PR should not require any changes to the HTML spec PR.
